summary_pt: Sistema acadêmico em Java para matrícula e biblioteca, com regras de negócio explícitas, persistência em MySQL e integração com microsserviços externos.
summary_en: Java academic management system for enrollment and library operations, with explicit business rules, MySQL persistence, and integration with external microservices.

problem.pt: Sistemas acadêmicos precisam validar matrículas, disponibilidade de vagas e reservas de biblioteca sem perder consistência de regras e dados.
problem.en: Academic systems need to validate enrollments, seat availability, and library reservations without losing business-rule and data consistency.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para praticar arquitetura em camadas, regras de negócio fortes e integração entre persistência local e serviços externos em um domínio acadêmico realista.
why_built.en: It was built to practice layered architecture, strong business rules, and the integration between local persistence and external services in a realistic academic domain.

solution.pt: Aplicação Java com camadas de Controller, Service, Repository e View, validando matrículas, reservas e consultas enquanto integra três APIs externas e armazena operações localmente em MySQL.
solution.en: A Java application with Controller, Service, Repository, and View layers, validating enrollments, reservations, and lookups while integrating three external APIs and storing operations locally in MySQL.

what_it_solves.pt: Centraliza consultas acadêmicas, controle de matrículas e biblioteca com regras explícitas para curso, status do aluno, vagas e reservas.
what_it_solves.en: It centralizes academic lookups, enrollment control, and library flows with explicit rules for course compatibility, student status, seat availability, and reservations.

target_users.pt: Operadores acadêmicos responsáveis por matrícula, consulta e biblioteca.
target_users.en: Academic operators responsible for enrollment, lookup, and library operations.

key_features: Parallel cache warm-up for external services

architecture.pt: Arquitetura em camadas com ConsoleView, controllers especializados, services de orquestração, repositories JDBC/MySQL e fachada para microsserviços externos.
architecture.en: Layered architecture with ConsoleView, specialized controllers, orchestration services, JDBC/MySQL repositories, and a facade for external microservices.

data_model.pt: Modelo relacional centrado em matrícula e reserva, com exceções específicas para regras de domínio.
data_model.en: Relational model centered on enrollments and reservations, with domain-specific exceptions for rule enforcement.

auth.pt: Não há autenticação de usuários finais explicitamente documentada no repositório.
auth.en: There is no explicitly documented end-user authentication flow in the repository.

integrations.pt: Integra três microsserviços REST externos e persiste operações locais em MySQL.
integrations.en: It integrates three external REST microservices and persists local operations in MySQL.

strengths: Clear layered architecture
Strong business-rule enforcement
Good Java backend signaling
Explicit external integration model
Detailed README with technical structure
tradeoffs: Console UI instead of graphical or web UI
No documented automated test suite
No explicit authentication layer

evidence_sources.note: Project listed in practical experience and technical skills.
Repository description confirms Java + MySQL.
README documents features, architecture, patterns, and external APIs.

summary_pt: Sistema full stack de delivery com múltiplos papéis, autenticação JWT, CRUD operacional e domínio amplo de pedidos, cardápio, entregas e avaliações.
summary_en: Full-stack delivery system with multiple user roles, JWT authentication, operational CRUD flows, and a broader domain covering orders, menus, deliveries, and reviews.

problem.pt: Um sistema de delivery precisa coordenar clientes, restaurantes e entregadores sem perder clareza operacional entre pedidos, cardápio, endereços, entregas e avaliações.
problem.en: A delivery system must coordinate customers, restaurants, and couriers without losing operational clarity across orders, menus, addresses, deliveries, and reviews.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para praticar um domínio full stack mais completo, com múltiplos papéis de usuário, API REST e autenticação aplicadas a uma operação de delivery.
why_built.en: It was built to practice a more complete full-stack domain, with multiple user roles, a REST API, and authentication applied to delivery operations.

solution.pt: Aplicação React + Node.js com backend autenticado via JWT, banco MySQL, separação frontend/backend e funcionalidades específicas para cliente, restaurante e entregador.
solution.en: A React + Node.js application with a JWT-authenticated backend, MySQL database, explicit frontend/backend separation, and role-specific flows for customers, restaurants, and couriers.

what_it_solves.pt: Organiza o ciclo completo de pedidos, gerenciamento de cardápio, endereços, entregas e avaliações em um único sistema operacional.
what_it_solves.en: It organizes the full cycle of orders, menu management, addresses, deliveries, and reviews in a single operational system.

target_users.pt: Clientes fazem pedidos, restaurantes administram o catálogo e entregadores operam a entrega.
target_users.en: Customers place orders, restaurants manage the catalog, and couriers handle delivery execution.

key_features: Review system with score and comment

architecture.pt: Estrutura full stack separando frontend React, backend Node.js e recursos de banco/diagramas, com Context API no cliente e API REST no servidor.
architecture.en: Full-stack structure separating a React frontend, Node.js backend, and database/diagram assets, with Context API on the client and a REST API on the server.

data_model.pt: Modelo de dados orientado ao fluxo operacional de delivery, cobrindo catálogo, pedido, entrega e avaliação.
data_model.en: A data model oriented around delivery operations, covering catalog, ordering, delivery, and review flows.

auth.pt: Autenticação via JWT com expiração e proteção complementar por bcrypt e Helmet.
auth.en: JWT authentication with expiration, complemented by bcrypt and Helmet.

integrations.pt: Integra persistência relacional, autenticação JWT e camadas básicas de segurança no backend.
integrations.en: It integrates relational persistence, JWT authentication, and baseline backend security layers.

strengths: Broadest business-domain coverage among the portfolio apps
Multiple user roles
Full-stack split with database and diagrams
Clear JWT and backend security basics
Good candidate for operational system discussions
tradeoffs: No TypeScript on the main application stack
No explicit production deployment evidence
Automated test coverage is not clearly documented

evidence_sources.note: Project listed in practical experience.
Repository description confirms MySQL + React + Node.js.
README documents roles, features, API groups, security, and diagrams.
Repository tree confirms backend/frontend/database split and high file count.

summary_pt: Sistema de gestão de academia com foco em administração de alunos, planos, pagamentos, treinos, avaliações físicas e frequência.
summary_en: Gym management system focused on administering students, plans, payments, workouts, physical assessments, and attendance.

problem.pt: Academias precisam controlar cadastro, planos, pagamentos, treinos e frequência em um único fluxo administrativo.
problem.en: Gyms need to control registration, plans, payments, workouts, and attendance within a single administrative flow.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para praticar modelagem de domínio de um sistema administrativo rico, combinando Java, Spring Boot, Java Swing e MySQL.
why_built.en: It was built to practice rich administrative domain modeling by combining Java, Spring Boot, Java Swing, and MySQL.

solution.pt: Sistema desktop com interface em Java Swing, backend em Java/Spring Boot e persistência em MySQL para administrar alunos, instrutores, planos, pagamentos, treinos e check-ins.
solution.en: A desktop system with a Java Swing interface, Java/Spring Boot backend, and MySQL persistence to manage students, instructors, plans, payments, workouts, and check-ins.

what_it_solves.pt: Concentra a operação de academia em um sistema só, reduzindo dispersão entre cadastro, financeiro, treino e acompanhamento físico.
what_it_solves.en: It consolidates gym operations into a single system, reducing fragmentation across registration, finances, workouts, and physical follow-up.

target_users.pt: Administradores e equipe operacional de academia, com apoio a gestão de instrutores e alunos.
target_users.en: Gym administrators and operational staff, with support for instructor and student management.

architecture.pt: Sistema desktop de administração com modelagem documentada por diagramas e combinação de interface Swing, persistência MySQL e backend em Java/Spring Boot.
architecture.en: Desktop administration system with diagrammed modeling and a combination of Swing UI, MySQL persistence, and a Java/Spring Boot backend.

data_model.pt: Modelo de domínio centrado na gestão operacional da academia, cobrindo financeiro, treino e acompanhamento físico.
data_model.en: Domain model centered on gym operations, covering finances, workouts, and physical follow-up.

auth.pt: O repositório não documenta uma camada explícita de autenticação ou autorização.
auth.en: The repository does not document an explicit authentication or authorization layer.

integrations.pt: Integra interface desktop, backend Java/Spring Boot e banco relacional MySQL.
integrations.en: It integrates a desktop UI, Java/Spring Boot backend, and a MySQL relational database.

api_surface.notes: No external API surface is explicitly documented.

strengths: Rich administrative domain
Desktop plus backend composition
Spring Boot in the portfolio stack
Useful project for gym/business system conversations
tradeoffs: Repository documentation is thinner than the strongest projects
No explicit auth or test evidence
GitHub language breakdown is unavailable through the API

evidence_sources.note: CV states Spring Boot, Java Swing, MySQL, and layered design.
Repository description confirms SpringBoot, JavaSwing, and MySQL.
README lists functional scope and technology/tooling setup.

summary_pt: Sistema full stack de indicação com React, TypeScript, NestJS, SQLite e autenticação JWT, construído para demonstrar fluxo de usuários, autenticação e modelagem relacional recursiva.
summary_en: Full-stack referral system with React, TypeScript, NestJS, SQLite, and JWT authentication, built to demonstrate user flows, authentication, and recursive relational modeling.

problem.pt: Sistemas de indicação precisam registrar usuários com segurança, preservar vínculo entre indicado e quem indicou, e expor isso de forma simples para o usuário.
problem.en: Referral systems need to register users securely, preserve the relationship between the invited user and the referrer, and expose that flow simply to the user.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para praticar NestJS, TypeScript full stack, autenticação JWT, modelagem com TypeORM e um fluxo de produto enxuto, mas completo.
why_built.en: It was built to practice NestJS, full-stack TypeScript, JWT authentication, TypeORM modeling, and a lean but complete product flow.

solution.pt: SPA React em TypeScript com backend NestJS e SQLite, usando JWT, links de indicação, página de perfil, validação e Context API para orquestrar autenticação e experiência do usuário.
solution.en: A TypeScript React SPA with a NestJS and SQLite backend, using JWT, referral links, a profile page, validation, and Context API to orchestrate authentication and user experience.

what_it_solves.pt: Entrega um fluxo completo de registro, login, indicação e acompanhamento de perfil em um sistema de escopo enxuto, porém tecnicamente consistente.
what_it_solves.en: It delivers a complete registration, login, referral, and profile flow in a lean but technically consistent system.

target_users.pt: Usuários que se cadastram, entram no sistema e compartilham links de indicação.
target_users.en: Users who sign up, log in, and share referral links.

architecture.pt: Backend NestJS organizado em módulos de auth, users, common e database; frontend React organizado por componentes, contexts, pages, services, utils e config.
architecture.en: NestJS backend organized into auth, users, common, and database modules; React frontend organized by components, contexts, pages, services, utils, and config.

data_model.pt: Modelagem relacional com usuário referenciando outro usuário via relação recursiva no TypeORM.
data_model.en: Relational modeling where a user references another user through a recursive TypeORM relation.

auth.pt: JWT com guards, decorators customizados, hash de senha e rotas protegidas.
auth.en: JWT with guards, custom decorators, password hashing, and protected routes.

integrations.pt: Integra TypeORM, SQLite e autenticação JWT para um fluxo completo de usuários.
integrations.en: It integrates TypeORM, SQLite, and JWT authentication for a complete user flow.

strengths: Strongest NestJS example in the portfolio
Clear JWT and auth structure
Good TypeScript full-stack signal
Well-documented architecture and learning process
tradeoffs: Smaller domain scope than Delivery System
No explicit production deployment evidence
Automated test evidence is limited

evidence_sources.note: CV states NestJS, React, SQLite, JWT, and SOLID usage.
Repository description confirms React + TypeScript + NestJS + SQLite + AI.
README documents architecture, auth flow, TypeORM relation, and feature set.
Tree confirms frontend/backend split with modular NestJS and React structure.

summary_pt: Portfólio autoral em React e TypeScript com motion editorial, GitHub stats, contato e chatbot com IA usando RAG sobre a própria trajetória técnica.
summary_en: Authorial portfolio in React and TypeScript focused on editorial motion, GitHub stats, contact flows, and an AI chatbot using RAG over Paulo's own technical history.

problem.pt: Um portfólio padrão comunica pouco sobre profundidade técnica e raramente permite exploração dinâmica sobre projetos, stacks e perfil profissional.
problem.en: A standard portfolio communicates little about technical depth and rarely allows dynamic exploration of projects, stacks, and professional profile.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para apresentar Paulo em um formato mais autoral, com melhor direção visual, integração com GitHub e um chatbot capaz de responder perguntas contextuais sobre a carreira e os projetos.
why_built.en: It was built to present Paulo in a more authorial format, with stronger visual direction, GitHub integration, and a chatbot capable of answering contextual questions about his career and projects.

solution.pt: Single-page app em React 19 e TypeScript, com hero scroll-driven, navegação responsiva, estatísticas do GitHub, contato com fallback e backend serverless para chat com múltiplos provedores e Supabase pgvector.
solution.en: A React 19 and TypeScript single-page app with a scroll-driven hero, responsive navigation, GitHub statistics, contact flow with fallback, and a serverless chat backend with multiple providers and Supabase pgvector.

what_it_solves.pt: Transforma o portfólio em uma experiência técnica mais explorável, unindo apresentação visual, contato e recuperação de conhecimento sobre Paulo e seus projetos.
what_it_solves.en: It turns the portfolio into a more explorable technical experience, combining visual presentation, contact, and knowledge retrieval about Paulo and his projects.

target_users.pt: Pessoas avaliando o perfil técnico de Paulo e querendo navegar rapidamente por projetos, stack e contexto profissional.
target_users.en: People evaluating Paulo's technical profile and wanting to navigate quickly through projects, stack, and professional context.

architecture.pt: Frontend React organizado em sections, contexts e hooks; backend Vercel em api com SSE, segurança, provider fallback e RAG em Supabase; estilo visual centralizado em src/index.css.
architecture.en: React frontend organized into sections, contexts, and hooks; Vercel backend in api with SSE, security, provider fallback, and Supabase RAG; visual style centralized in src/index.css.

data_model.pt: Modelo híbrido entre conteúdo de portfólio, chunks vetoriais, cache de embeddings e dados do GitHub para resposta contextual.
data_model.en: A hybrid model combining portfolio content, vector chunks, embedding cache, and GitHub data for contextual answers.

auth.pt: Não há autenticação de usuários finais; o foco está em conteúdo público, proteção básica de API e rate limiting.
auth.en: There is no end-user authentication; the focus is on public content, basic API protection, and rate limiting.

integrations.pt: Integra dados do GitHub, envio de contato, múltiplos provedores de LLM e Supabase para RAG.
integrations.en: It integrates GitHub data, contact delivery, multiple LLM providers, and Supabase for RAG.

primary_flows: Ask questions in PT or EN

strengths: Most polished frontend in the portfolio
Live deploy and current maintenance
Strongest AI and integration story
Bilingual UX plus chat
Good mix of product presentation and implementation depth
tradeoffs: Public-content site rather than a business CRUD system
Chat accuracy depends on knowledge curation quality
Local dev chat behavior depends on backend availability

evidence_sources.note: Repository architecture snapshot and current stack.
Repository description confirms React + TypeScript + AI.
README documents goals, stack, architecture, integrations, and deployment.
Current chat backend documents SSE, provider fallback, and RAG implementation.

summary_pt: Agente ReAct observável: backend LangGraph que transmite todo o traço de raciocínio e ação (passos do modelo, chamadas de ferramentas, observações, uso e latência) via SSE para uma interface React de inspeção, com harness de avaliação rodando sobre o grafo real.
summary_en: An observable ReAct agent: a LangGraph backend that streams its full reasoning-and-action trace (model steps, tool calls, observations, usage, latency) over SSE to a React inspection UI, with an evaluation harness that runs against the real graph.

problem.pt: Agentes que usam ferramentas costumam expor apenas a resposta final, escondendo o ciclo de raciocínio/ação e tornando o comportamento difícil de inspecionar, testar e operar.
problem.en: Tool-using agents usually expose only the final answer, hiding the reasoning/action cycle and making behavior hard to inspect, test, and operate.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para tornar o comportamento de agentes observável e testável, modelando o laço ReAct como um StateGraph do LangGraph e tratando o traço de raciocínio como superfície de produto de primeira classe.
why_built.en: It was built to make agent behavior observable and testable, modeling the ReAct loop as a LangGraph StateGraph and treating the reasoning trace as a first-class product surface.

solution.pt: Backend Python com StateGraph do LangGraph e wrappers de LLM com rastreio de uso, ferramentas explícitas (busca web, execução Python restrita, cálculo) e uma camada FastAPI que transmite eventos de traço via SSE para um frontend React/Vite que separa conversa e raciocínio.
solution.en: A Python backend with a LangGraph StateGraph and usage-tracking LLM wrappers, explicit tools (web search, restricted Python execution, math), and a FastAPI layer that streams trace events over SSE to a React/Vite frontend that separates conversation from reasoning.

what_it_solves.pt: Expõe o ciclo de raciocínio/ação de um agente em tempo real, com uso, custo, latência e erros visíveis, e valida o agente com casos rotulados executados contra o grafo real em vez de mocks.
what_it_solves.en: It surfaces an agent's reasoning/action cycle in real time, with usage, cost, latency, and errors made visible, and validates the agent with labeled cases run against the real graph rather than mocks.

target_users.pt: Engenheiros e desenvolvedores que precisam inspecionar e avaliar o comportamento de agentes que usam ferramentas.
target_users.en: Engineers and developers who need to inspect and evaluate the behavior of tool-using agents.

key_features: ReAct loop as a LangGraph StateGraph
Per-run usage, cost, and latency tracking
Tooling: web search, restricted Python, math
Evaluation harness over the real graph

architecture.style: Agent backend plus streaming inspection frontend
architecture.pt: Grafo de estado LangGraph compilado por build_graph(), camada de LLMs que normaliza incompatibilidades de provedores, ferramentas isoladas e API FastAPI que emite eventos de stream para hooks e painéis React dedicados.
architecture.en: A LangGraph state graph compiled by build_graph(), an LLM layer that normalizes provider incompatibilities, isolated tools, and a FastAPI API that emits stream events to dedicated React hooks and panels.

data_model.pt: Estado do grafo orientado a mensagens, chamadas de ferramentas, observações e métricas de uso por execução.
data_model.en: A graph state oriented around messages, tool calls, observations, and per-run usage metrics.

auth.pt: Não há autenticação de usuários finais; a execução de Python e math é a superfície mais sensível e exige isolamento explícito.
auth.en: There is no end-user authentication; Python and math execution is the most security-sensitive surface and requires explicit isolation.

integrations.pt: Integra busca web Tavily, execução Python restrita, avaliação matemática e provedores de LLM, transmitindo traços via SSE.
integrations.en: It integrates Tavily web search, restricted Python execution, math evaluation, and LLM providers, streaming traces over SSE.

strengths: Reasoning/tool trace treated as a first-class product surface
Observable usage, cost, and latency per run
Evaluation harness over the real graph
Live public deployment
Clean separation between conversation and execution detail
tradeoffs: Python/math execution is a real security surface needing isolation
Model-provider APIs and trace formats are unstable dependencies
No end-user authentication layer

evidence_sources.note: Repository describes a ReAct agent with python executor, web search, and calculator tools.
Live public deployment of the agent inspector.
Vault page documents objective, stack, architecture flow, and engineering decisions.

summary_pt: Sistema completo de RAG capaz de operar offline: ingestão, indexação no ChromaDB, retrieval híbrido (BM25 + denso + fusão por reciprocal-rank + reranking), síntese por LLM com fallback extrativo e avaliação com métricas léxicas offline e RAGAS opcional na nuvem — tudo revisável em uma interface Streamlit.
summary_en: An end-to-end, offline-capable RAG system: ingestion, ChromaDB indexing, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + dense + reciprocal-rank fusion + reranking), LLM synthesis with extractive fallback, and evaluation with offline lexical metrics plus optional cloud RAGAS — all reviewable in a Streamlit interface.

problem.pt: Muitas demos de RAG são apenas busca vetorial e param de funcionar sem provedores pagos, sem oferecer avaliação honesta nem permitir trocar estratégias de retrieval de forma independente.
problem.en: Many RAG demos are just vector search and stop working without paid providers, offering no honest evaluation and no way to swap retrieval strategies independently.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para tratar RAG como um sistema de engenharia, separando ingestão, retrieval, síntese, orquestração e avaliação, com métricas léxicas offline e fallbacks extrativos para manter o sistema testável e honesto quando a nuvem não está disponível.
why_built.en: It was built to treat RAG as an engineering system, separating ingestion, retrieval, synthesis, orchestration, and evaluation, with offline lexical metrics and extractive fallbacks to keep it testable and honest when cloud services are unavailable.

solution.pt: Aplicação Python/Streamlit que cobre todo o ciclo: carregamento de fontes, ingestão e indexação no ChromaDB, retrieval híbrido com fusão e reranking, síntese por LLM com fallback extrativo, e avaliação com golden datasets, métricas léxicas offline e execução opcional de RAGAS na nuvem.
solution.en: A Python/Streamlit application covering the full cycle: source loading, ingestion and ChromaDB indexing, hybrid retrieval with fusion and reranking, LLM synthesis with extractive fallback, and evaluation with golden datasets, offline lexical metrics, and optional cloud RAGAS execution.

what_it_solves.pt: Entrega um RAG configurável e avaliável que continua útil sem provedores pagos, permitindo comparar estratégias de retrieval e políticas de provedor de forma independente e auditável.
what_it_solves.en: It delivers a configurable, evaluable RAG that stays useful without paid providers, letting retrieval strategies and provider policies be compared independently and auditably.

target_users.pt: Engenheiros que projetam, comparam e avaliam pipelines de RAG e estratégias de retrieval.
target_users.en: Engineers who design, compare, and evaluate RAG pipelines and retrieval strategies.

key_features: Source loading from files, PDF, DOCX, GitHub/Hugging Face
Hybrid retrieval: BM25 + dense + reciprocal-rank fusion
Golden datasets and offline lexical metrics
Opt-in cloud RAGAS evaluation with degradation states
Streamlit ingestion, query, and evaluation review UI

architecture.style: Modular RAG pipeline with Streamlit review UI
architecture.pt: Camadas separadas de source_loader, ingestion, retrieval, pipeline, synthesis e evaluate/cloud_ragas, expostas por um app Streamlit, permitindo trocar estratégias e políticas de provedor independentemente.
architecture.en: Separated source_loader, ingestion, retrieval, pipeline, synthesis, and evaluate/cloud_ragas layers exposed through a Streamlit app, so strategies and provider policies can be swapped independently.

data_model.pt: Modelo centrado em fontes versionadas, chunks vetoriais no ChromaDB, golden datasets e relatórios de avaliação.
data_model.en: A model centered on versioned sources, vector chunks in ChromaDB, golden datasets, and evaluation reports.

auth.pt: Não há autenticação de usuários finais; o foco é avaliação reprodutível e políticas explícitas de provedor.
auth.en: There is no end-user authentication; the focus is reproducible evaluation and explicit provider policies.

integrations.pt: Integra ChromaDB, retrieval léxico e denso, reranking, provedores de LLM e RAGAS opcional na nuvem.
integrations.en: It integrates ChromaDB, lexical and dense retrieval, reranking, LLM providers, and optional cloud RAGAS.

strengths: Treats RAG as a full engineering system, not a single vector-search demo
Works offline with honest lexical metrics and extractive fallback
Hybrid retrieval ablatable into individual strategies
Extensive test suite with fake Streamlit/runtime/provider components
Live public Streamlit deployment
tradeoffs: Streamlit UI is utilitarian rather than highly polished
Some evaluation/UI modules show low community cohesion and could be decomposed
Persistent Chroma data needs a deliberate hosting target

evidence_sources.note: Repository describes Advanced RAG with RAGAS evaluation.
Live public Streamlit deployment.
Vault page documents lifecycle, hybrid retrieval, evaluation, and engineering decisions.

summary_pt: Fine-tuning QLoRA do Phi-3 Mini (3.8B) da Microsoft para gerar SQL a partir de linguagem natural, treinado em 4-bit numa única GPU T4 em ~21 min; eleva a acurácia exact-match de 2% (modelo base) para 73,5%, publicado no Hugging Face Hub como adapter LoRA e modelo mesclado.
summary_en: A QLoRA fine-tune of Microsoft's Phi-3 Mini (3.8B) for natural-language-to-SQL, trained 4-bit on a single T4 GPU in ~21 min; it lifts exact-match accuracy from 2% (base model) to 73.5%, published to the Hugging Face Hub as both a LoRA adapter and a merged model.

problem.pt: Modelos base pequenos geram SQL com baixa acurácia (cerca de 2% exact-match) e o fine-tuning completo é caro demais para hardware acessível.
problem.en: Small base models generate SQL with low accuracy (around 2% exact match), and full fine-tuning is too expensive for accessible hardware.

why_built.pt: Foi construído para demonstrar competência em ML ops e fine-tuning completo — do dataset à publicação no Hugging Face Hub — usando fine-tuning eficiente em parâmetros viável em uma única GPU T4.
why_built.en: It was built to demonstrate ML ops and end-to-end fine-tuning competence — from dataset to Hugging Face Hub publication — using parameter-efficient fine-tuning feasible on a single T4 GPU.

solution.pt: Pipeline QLoRA (LoRA com quantização 4-bit NF4) sobre o Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct: preparo do dataset SQL Create Context em formato instrução, treino de adapters LoRA, avaliação por exact-match e publicação do adapter e do modelo mesclado no Hub.
solution.en: A QLoRA pipeline (LoRA with 4-bit NF4 quantization) over Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct: preparing the SQL Create Context dataset into instruction format, training LoRA adapters, evaluating by exact match, and publishing the adapter and merged model to the Hub.

what_it_solves.pt: Entrega um gerador de SQL (SELECT) a partir de linguagem natural com 73,5% de exact-match, treinável de forma barata e reprodutível, com demo pública no Hugging Face Spaces.
what_it_solves.en: It delivers a natural-language-to-SQL (SELECT) generator with 73.5% exact match, trainable cheaply and reproducibly, with a public demo on Hugging Face Spaces.

target_users.pt: Engenheiros de ML e desenvolvedores interessados em fine-tuning eficiente e geração de SQL.
target_users.en: ML engineers and developers interested in efficient fine-tuning and SQL generation.

key_features: Published to the Hugging Face Hub

architecture.pt: Pipeline em notebooks (preparo de dataset, treino QLoRA, avaliação) sincronizado via Drive e executado no Colab com GPU T4, publicando artefatos no Hugging Face Hub.
architecture.en: A notebook pipeline (dataset prep, QLoRA training, evaluation) synced via Drive and run on Colab with a T4 GPU, publishing artifacts to the Hugging Face Hub.

data_model.pt: Dados de instrução derivados do SQL Create Context (1.000 treino + 200 validação) e artefatos de modelo publicados.
data_model.en: Instruction data derived from SQL Create Context (1,000 train + 200 validation) and published model artifacts.

auth.pt: Não se aplica: é um projeto de treino e publicação de modelo, sem autenticação de usuários.
auth.en: Not applicable: it is a model training and publishing project, without user authentication.

integrations.pt: Integra dataset do Hugging Face, treino no Colab e publicação de adapter, modelo mesclado e demo no Hub/Spaces.
integrations.en: It integrates a Hugging Face dataset, Colab training, and publication of the adapter, merged model, and demo on the Hub/Spaces.

strengths: Large measurable gain: 2% to 73.5% exact match
Efficient 4-bit training on a single free-tier T4
Complete pipeline from dataset to published artifacts
Adapter and merged model both published on the Hub
Public Hugging Face Spaces demo and detailed documentation
tradeoffs: Trained on SELECT queries only (no INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL)
Best on low-to-medium complexity queries; weaker on multi-JOINs and nested subqueries
Not tested against dialect-specific SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL)

evidence_sources.note: Repository describes a QLoRA fine-tuned model trained on a T4 GPU for SQL generation.
Public Hugging Face Spaces demo.
Published LoRA adapter documenting the training pipeline.
Vault page documents dataset, training, metrics, capabilities, and limitations.
